hooks.command: cd ~/Desktop/summer_project && git pull origin hobbbit 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "
import json, os
p = os.path.expanduser('~/Desktop/summer_project')
cache = 'JUNK/CACHE FILES TO REVIEW:\n  ~/.nsys-symbols       — CUDA symbol cache (NOT YET CREATED)\n  ~/results/nsight/     — nsys profiling output (NOT YET CREATED)\n  /opt/kraken2-build/   — Kraken-2 -pg build (NOT YET CREATED)'
try: idx = open(p+'/index.md').read()
except: idx = '(index.md not found)'
try: ds = ''.join(open(p+'/daily_summary.md').readlines()[-40:])
except: ds = '(daily_summary.md not found)'
msg = cache + '\n\n=== MEMORY RECAP ===\n\n=== index.md ===\n' + idx + '\n=== daily_summary.md (recent) ===\n' + ds
print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': msg}))
"

allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); assets=[a['browser_download_url'] for a in data['assets'] if 'win64' in a['name'] and a['name'].endswith\('.zip'\)]; print\(assets[0] if assets else 'not found'\); print\('version:', data['tag_name']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a['name'], a['browser_download_url']\) for a in data['assets']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(len\(data\), 'assets'\); [print\(a['name']\) for a in data]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['tag_name'], len\(r['assets']\), 'assets'\) for r in data]")
